_comment: Embedded-theme example: the diagram names a built-in theme via the
top-level 'theme' key. No sidecar theme.json needed.
Equivalent CLI form:  python scripts/mmpviz.py -d diagram.json -t plantuml -o out.svg
Intended use: Kroki-style HTTP rendering, where a stateless server renders
a single POSTed JSON body without access to sibling files.
title: Embedded Theme — Built-in Reference
